summary: Mobile UI regression sweep (390x844) after two fixes: (a) carousel dots horizontal via index.css min-height:40px exclusion, (b) Header mobile-menu-panel pointer-events-auto. Ran 18 checks across burger menu, mobile nav, FAQ accordion, landing carousels, pricing pack CTAs, /offers, /gift-cards, /checkout/single pay tabs + sticky pay bar, cart button, and desktop regression. 18/18 PASS, 0 FAIL. Both user-reported bugs are fully resolved.

issues: The open menu panel is semi-transparent (bg-[rgba(10,10,14,0.92)]) so underlying hero text bleeds through slightly, making the menu look visually noisy on busy backgrounds. Not a functional issue — all tap targets work — but increasing opacity to ~0.96 or adding a stronger backdrop-blur would improve legibility.

action_items: (OPTIONAL, cosmetic) Increase mobile-menu-panel background opacity or blur to reduce bleed-through on the home hero.

(LOW, pre-existing) /api/admin/check-ip returns 401 for non-admin visitors on every page load — console noise. Suppress the error log in Header.js useEffect or have the endpoint return 200 with { is_admin: false }.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix (a) carousel dots — correctly scoped selector: button:not([data-testid^="carousel-dot-"]) etc. Verified dot 0 active = 24x6px, dot 1 inactive = 6x6px on mobile viewport. Clean fix.

Fix (b) mobile-menu-panel — pointer-events:auto correctly added on the inner panel div, overriding the pointer-events-none wrapper. getComputedStyle confirmed 'auto'. All 4 tap targets (mobile-nav-home/offers/gift-cards, mobile-cta-btn) are clickable and navigate correctly.
No fullscreen fixed overlays with pointer-events≠none detected — verified via runtime DOM scan (0 blockers found).
FAQ accordion: single-state behaviour confirmed — faq-0 aria-expanded goes true→false automatically when faq-1 is opened. All 5 items (faq-0..faq-4) toggle correctly.

Checkout pay-method tabs (data-testid=pay-method-crypto/stripe) correctly toggle aria-checked true/false on click. Sticky pay button (data-testid=sticky-pay-btn) is visible at y≈785 / height 49px on the 390x844 viewport.
Pricing pack CTAs (pack-starter-cta, pack-popular-cta, pack-premium-cta) each render exactly once on the landing page and navigate to /offers on click — good.
Minor console noise: 5+ 401 responses on every page (likely /api/admin/check-ip for non-admin visitors). Consider returning 200 with is_admin=false to keep the console clean.
test_credentials: admin@deezlink.com / DeezLink2024! — not exercised this run (frontend mobile regression focus).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile tap-interaction regression is fully green. Carousel dots fix and mobile-menu pointer-events fix both verified via Playwright .click() (page context doesn't support .tap() — hasTouch not enabled, but click() exercises the same React onClick handlers). If next iteration needs true touch events, launch browser with has_touch=true is_mobile=true when constructing the context. Screenshot set: mob_home, mob_menu_open, mob_offers, mob_cart, mob_checkout, mob_giftcards — all visually coherent. The big red 'NINE INCH NAILS / Nine Inch Noize' trending tile in hero is intact as expected.
rca of the issue: N/A — both previously reported bugs (tall vertical carousel dots; unresponsive mobile menu tabs) are RESOLVED by the two fixes the main agent applied. No new blockers found.
